name: music-vibe-test
description: Canonical modular music identity and listening journal with bounded recommendation feedback, interaction history, editorial recommendations, friend listening, and accessible browser quality gates

scripts.test: node tests/p0-smoke.test.cjs && node tests/p1-smoke.test.cjs && node tests/p2-smoke.test.cjs && node tests/v2-smoke.test.cjs && node tests/v2-domain.test.mjs && node tests/v2-quality.test.mjs && node tests/v2-brand.test.mjs && node tests/v2-stabilization.test.mjs && node tests/editorial-integrity.test.mjs && node tests/frontend-consolidation.test.mjs && node tests/v2-feedback.test.mjs && node tests/profile-audit.test.mjs && node scripts/verify-release.mjs
scripts.test:syntax: node --check p0-fixes.js && node --check p1-experience.js && node --check p2-analytics.js && node --check p2-operations.js && node --check p2-static.js && node --check src/v2/main.mjs && node --check src/v2/ui/helpers.mjs && node --check src/v2/ui/app.mjs && node --check src/v2/ui/actions.mjs && node --check src/v2/ui/components/shell.mjs && node --check src/v2/ui/screens/home.mjs && node --check src/v2/ui/screens/discover.mjs && node --check src/v2/ui/screens/empty.mjs && node --check src/v2/ui/screens/profile.mjs && node --check src/v2/ui/screens/now.mjs && node --check src/v2/ui/screens/match.mjs && node --check src/v2/quality/visuals.mjs && node --check src/v2/brand/copy.mjs && node --check src/v2/data/axes.mjs && node --check src/v2/data/archetypes.mjs && node --check src/v2/data/questions.mjs && node --check src/v2/data/contexts.mjs && node --check src/v2/data/tracks.mjs && node --check src/v2/data/editorial-tracks.mjs && node --check src/v2/data/home-showcase.mjs && node --check src/v2/domain/profile.mjs && node --check src/v2/domain/presentation.mjs && node --check src/v2/domain/feedback.mjs && node --check src/v2/domain/recommendation.mjs && node --check src/v2/domain/match.mjs && node --check src/v2/infrastructure/storage.mjs && node --check src/v2/infrastructure/share.mjs && node --check scripts/profile-audit.mjs && node --check scripts/verify-release.mjs && node --check playwright.config.mjs
